name: Chocolate Chow Mein Clusters
recipeIngredient: 1 can (3 oz.) Chow Mein noodles (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-cup glass measure or bowl, combine the first four ingredients.
2. Heat uncovered at HIGH for 2 minutes until all is melted, stirring once to blend.
3. Add the noodles, stirring gently until evenly coated.
4. Drop teaspoon portions onto waxed paper.
5. Let stand until firm.
Makes 2 1/2 dozen.
